memoryArtifacts.headline: Odo of Bayeux
memoryArtifacts.description:
Odo of Bayeux
11th-century Bishop of Bayeux and half-brother of William the Conqueror

Odo of Bayeux (died 1097), Earl of Kent and Bishop of Bayeux, was the uterine half-brother of William the Conquer …

zh.Conteville, Somme, Picardie, France: 法國皮卡迪索姆孔特維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux於1030年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆孔特維爾時，他的父親Herluin de Conteville29歲，母親Herleva de Falaise27歲。他和Muriel de Conterville至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1097年2月在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫享年67歲，埋葬在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫甘吉桑塔 瑪麗亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux于1030年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆孔特維爾时，他的父亲Herluin de Conteville29岁，母亲Herleva de Falaise27岁。他和Muriel de Conterville至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于1097年2月在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫享年67岁，埋葬在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫甘吉桑塔 瑪麗亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

variants.name: Rodes
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux was born in 1030, in Conteville, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Herluin de Conteville, was 29 and his mother, Herleva de Falaise, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Muriel de Conterville. He registered for military service in 1066. He died in February 1097, in Palermo, Palermo, Sicily, Italy, at the age of 67, and was buried in Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sicily, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux est né en 1030, à Conteville, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Herluin de Conteville, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Herleva de Falaise, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Muriel de Conterville. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé en février 1097, à Palermo, Palermo, Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sicile, Italie.

de.Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sicily, Ita: Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux 1030 in Conteville, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herluin de Conteville 29 und seine Mutter Herleva de Falaise 27. Er hatte mit Muriel de Conterville mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb im Februar 1097 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Palermo, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien und wurde in Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux è nato il nel 1030 nel Conteville, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Herluin de Conteville, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Herleva de Falaise, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Muriel de Conterville. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì nel febbraio 1097, nel Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.

ja.Conteville, Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメコンテヴィル
ja.lifeSummary: Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeauxが1030年にフランスピカーディソンメコンテヴィルで生まれた時，父Herluin de Contevilleは29歳，母Herleva de Falaiseは27歳であった。彼はMuriel de Contervilleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1097年2月にイタリアシシリアプアラーモプアラーモで67歳で死去し，イタリアシシリアプアラーモガンジサンタ マリアにて埋葬された。

ko.Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sicily, Ita: 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 갱이 산타 마이아
ko.lifeSummary: Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux(이)가 1030년 프랑스 피카디 솜 콘테빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herluin de Conteville(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Herleva de Falaise(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Muriel de Conterville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1097년 2월 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 파일모에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 갱이 산타 마이아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux nasceu em 1030, em Conteville, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Herluin de Conteville, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Herleva de Falaise, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Muriel de Conterville. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1097, em Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Itália, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sicilia, Itália.

ru.Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sicily, Ita: санта маря, ганги, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes de Conteville Bishop of Bayeaux родился в 1030 г. в местности контевилл, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Herluin de Conteville было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Herleva de Falaise, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Muriel de Conterville. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер февраль 1097 г. в местности пеилирмо, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности санта маря, ганги, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Muriel de Conterville. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió en febrero de 1097, en Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Santa Maria, Gangi, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.
